title: BFT Shared State Message

$comment.description: Optional SPDX / project notice for file-level metadata (not part of runtime shared-state payload).

monotonic_version.description: Monotonic shared-state version used for replay protection.

warp_score.description: Current warp score bucket input used for dynamic drift ceilings.

leader_id.description: Logical identifier of the cluster leader node.

key_id.description: Key generation identifier used to sign the shared state.

shared_agreed_time.description: Leader's BFT-agreed Unix time (seconds since epoch).

shared_applied_drift.description: Leader's drift step applied in the last sync round (seconds).

leader_system_time_at_sync.description: Leader's raw OS Unix time at the moment of sync.

signature_hex.description: Hex-encoded signature over the canonical payload.
